'''dharaka''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:kabbalah|kabbalah]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''male''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| dh-r-k
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:kabbalah|kabbalah]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| male
|-
! Citation form
| dharaka
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:dhærækæth|dhærækæth]] || [[word:dhærækæj|dhærækæj]] || [[word:dhærækæsh|dhærækæsh]] || [[word:dhærækæ|dhærækæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:dhararakath|dhararakath]] || [[word:dhararakaj|dhararakaj]] || [[word:dhararakash|dhararakash]] || [[word:dhararaka|dhararaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:dharakath|dharakath]] || [[word:dharakaj|dharakaj]] || [[word:dharakash|dharakash]] || [[word:dharaka|dharaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:dharafkath|dharafkath]] || [[word:dharafkaj|dharafkaj]] || [[word:dharafkash|dharafkash]] || [[word:dharafkaf|dharafkaf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for male singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:dharakatha|dharakatha]] || [[word:dharakaja|dharakaja]] || [[word:dharakasha|dharakasha]] || [[word:dharakaka|dharakaka]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:dharakath|dharakath]] || [[word:dharakaj|dharakaj]] || [[word:dharakash|dharakash]] || [[word:dharaka|dharaka]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:dharakathal|dharakathal]] || [[word:dharakajal|dharakajal]] || [[word:dharakashal|dharakashal]] || [[word:dharakakal|dharakakal]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:dharakathatha|dharakathatha]] || [[word:dharakajaja|dharakajaja]] || [[word:dharakashasha|dharakashasha]] || [[word:dharakaka|dharakaka]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:dharakathan|dharakathan]] || [[word:dharakajan|dharakajan]] || [[word:dharakashan|dharakashan]] || [[word:dharakakan|dharakakan]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:dharakathaoro|dharakathaoro]] || [[word:dharakajaoro|dharakajaoro]] || [[word:dharakashaoro|dharakashaoro]] || [[word:dharakakaoro|dharakakaoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki male nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|a27364f}}
